title: Bakura Truce
content:

{{Quote|For the help you have given us, we will allow you to leave the Bakura system unmolested, and give you a head start back to Endor.|[[Governor/Legends|Imperial governor]] [[Wilek Nereus]]|<ref name="Truce" />}}
The '''Bakura Truce''', also known as the '''truce at Bakura''', was a temporary cessation of local hostilities between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was declared in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] for the duration of the [[Bakura Incident]] as the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] [[Ssi-ruuvi invasions|invaded]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].

Crafted and signed by [[Governor/Legends|Imperial Governor]] [[Wilek Nereus]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], the truce allowed the [[Bakura task force|Alliance aid fleet]] and the Bakuran defense force to collaborate against the [[Ssi-ruu]]k invasion. However, the truce was broken by Nereus, who ordered the ''[[Dominant]]'' to turn its guns on the Alliance flagship ''[[Flurry]]''.
